title: Portable Tables
description: Adds portable work benches to minecraft!
body:
Portable tables is simple utility mod that makes things like crafting tables easier to use by adding hot keys and GUI shortcuts

 

Current list of implemented tables:

  • Anvil (including damaged variants)
  • Bell (don't ask me why...)
  • Blast Furnace
  • Cartography Table
  • Crafting Table
  • Furnace
  • Grindstone
  • Loom
  • Stonecutter
  • Smoker
  • Smithing Table
